docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLAFRANCA, JOANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEUNG, STEPHEN LEUNG, HELENA THE LEASE IS IN CONFORMANCE WITH THE RTA AND SIGNED BY BOTH PARTIES, AND PARTIES ACTED IN ACCORDANCE WITH THIS AGREEMENT/WRITTEN CONTRACT FOR YEARS. ALL INDICIA IS THAT THIS WAS WHAT THE PARTIES INTENDED AND WHAT WAS APPROVED BY HUD. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HER BURDEN RE ADDITIONAL MAILBOX WAS REQUIRED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-23-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, STEPHEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-23-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, HELENA
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY VILLAFRANCA, JOANNE LEUNG, STEPHEN LEUNG, HELENA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF JOANNE VILLAFRANCA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEPHEN LEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HELENA LEUNG IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,754.92 FILED BY VILLAFRANCA, JOANNE AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, STEPHEN LEUNG, HELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
